query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lead_gen_staff (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  roleType ENUM('lg_cold_caller', 'lg_sms', 'am', 'lm') NOT NULL,
  isActive ENUM('true', 'false') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'true',
  startDate TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  endDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS kpi_markets (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  isActive ENUM('true', 'false') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'true',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS kpi_channels (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  isActive ENUM('true', 'false') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'true',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Insert default markets
INSERT INTO kpi_markets (name) VALUES ('Tennessee'), ('Global');

-- Insert default channels
INSERT INTO kpi_channels (name, code) VALUES 
  ('Cold Calls', 'cold_calls'),
  ('SMS', 'sms'),
  ('Forms', 'forms'),
  ('PPL', 'ppl'),
  ('JV', 'jv'),
  ('PPC', 'ppc'),
  ('Postcards', 'postcards'),
  ('Referrals', 'referrals');
